commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=bfc6be48c732cbed94208fdd58392cf540d5452d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds retry-once handling around `client.messages.create().asResponse()` in `src/llm/providers/anthropic.ts` for top-level `UND_ERR_SOCKET` errors.

PR surface: Source +19. Total +19 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level failure path: current main routes embedded Anthropic Messages through the guarded transport, and the linked issue includes logs with nested `UND_ERR_SOCKET` cause data. I did not live-reproduce the multi-hour stale-socket condition.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor needs to rework the fix and provide real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not auto-repair this external PR while the proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix(anthropic): retry on UND_ERR_SOCKET keep-alive failures (#87407)
target.author: jincheng-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
